name: Sweet Rolls- Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. SCALD MILK, then LET COOL TO LUKEWARM.
2. ADD YEAST and LET DISSOLVE.
3. ADD 1 1/2 CUPS FLOUR - BEAT THOROUGHLY until all ingredients are combined.
4. COVER AND LET REST in a WARM PLACE until LIGHT (about 10-15 minutes).
5. ADD SUGAR, SALT, EGGS, BUTTER and ENOUGH FLOUR to MAKE A SOFT DOUGH. KNEAD UNTIL SMOOTH and ELASTIC.
6. LET RISE TILL DOUBLED in VOLUME in a WARM PLACE.
7. ROLL TO 1/3 inch THICK and CUT with a DOUGHNUT CUTTER.
8. COOK in FAT at 310 F until GOLDEN.
9. GLAZE WITH POWDERED SUGAR MIXED WITH MILK (1 C SUGAR and 3 TABLESPOONS MILK) OR DIVIDE DOUGH and SHAPE INTO ROLLS.
10. PLACE on a BAKING SHEET and LET REST until ALMOST DOUBLED in SIZE.
11. BAKE AT 350 F for ABOUT 15 MINUTES or UNTIL LIGHTLY BROWNED.
